blocks.content: Olivia stood before the students who had gathered at the training grounds.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Since this is our first class, I'll explain everything to you directly. The sudden change in the curriculum may have confused you. However, a mage must be strong. You may already be somewhat familiar with 'Heaven's Trial.' It's a system developed by Louis Jacquebain, a pioneer in magical engineering, designed to simulate real combat scenarios even in a training environment.
The name Jacquebain echoed loudly in Neid's mind, as if amplified by a loudspeaker.
Jacquebain was the world's greatest magical engineer, the creator of the revolutionary masterpiece 'Image Zone.'
Thanks to the advent of the Image Zone, Spirit Zones became visible, and this system evolved into what is now known as Heaven's Trial.
While the world celebrates the illustrious reputation of combat mages, who is it that made these mages what they are today?
If it weren't for the device created by name, the level of mages would have stagnated for 30 years.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Thad, please bring the master bracelets.
Thad brought two bracelets. Olivia put them on her wrist and then showed them to the students.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Here are a red bracelet and a blue bracelet. Each bracelet has different functions, so make sure not to swap them with your friends. The red bracelet converts the mage's status into information, and the blue bracelet converts external conditions into information.
These two sets of information are sent to the tower to create a virtual world. Now, it's your turn to try.
The students received a pair of bracelets. As they put them on their wrists, red and blue lights illuminated.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Then, from now on, I will activate Heaven's Trial.
As the administrator activated the system, the ground began to shake as if an earthquake had occurred.
The height of the physical blocks on the floor changed, creating a complex terrain that simulated a natural environment.
When an unfamiliar virtual landscape was superimposed on the environment, the students stared in awe, their mouths agape.
They had heard about it from their graduating seniors, but experiencing it in person was incomparable in terms of realism.
The virtual landscape depicted the streets of the city of Creas.
Although no one was passing by, the scenery of hundreds of houses closely packed together was realistic enough to be believed.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: The cityscape isn't quite right. Please change the scenery.
The arrangement of the blocks began to shift.
The blocks along the northeastern edge, covering about a quarter of the total area, descended simultaneously.
Water filled the hollow and formed a lake, and from there the surrounding landscape changed into a forest.
It was a pristine mountain landscape untouched by human hands.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: As expected from a prestigious academy. Even with Heaven's Trial, creating a lake is challenging.
Over 80 percent of the natural features are physical blocks, but the scenery is entirely virtual.
The blue bracelet receives information and transmits it to your brain.
So, if you take off the bracelet, only the physical blocks will remain.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Take a moment to look around. I'll give you about 10 minutes.
The students lined up and entered Heaven's Trials.
The fact that they didn't break ranks even though no one had told them to do so was proof that they were nervous.
Even the stones lying around, which they were used to seeing in the mountains, felt novel.
Shirone and his group went over to the lake to examine it.
When Nade touched a tree, the blue bracelet lit up, transmitting the texture to him.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Amazing. This isn't even a physical block, are you really saying it's virtual?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even the leaves look real.
Shirone plucked a leaf.
It didn't disappear but remained in his palm as if it were real.
Iruki approached the lake, scooped up some water with his hand, and drank it.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: How is it? Does it taste like water?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Not only that, but it actually quenched my thirst.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Of course, it's an illusion. The brain decided it was water.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: This could be dangerous.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What if it wasn't water but fire instead?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Would the brain perceive the heat and cause the body to burn?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Since it wasn't real fire, it might not go that far.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: However, it wasn't something he could be sure of.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone looked back at Nade, who was knowledgeable in such matters.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Yes! It's very similar to the mechanism of Spirit Zone!

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: It's really amazing! Louis Jacquebain embodied the human mind through a mechanical device.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If a biologist's dream is to replace human organs with artificial ones, then an engineer's ultimate goal is a machine that can think like a human.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Although it was still far off, it seemed that at least Jacquebain had succeeded in converting the human mind into information.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: When they decided to open the Heaven's Trials to the advanced class, I heard there was a lot of opposition from the faculty.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Now I understand why. You could die if you're not careful.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Yes, you could die.
Before they realized it, Olivia had approached them.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: If I could die….

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: But don't worry.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Except for the graduation exam, the synchronization rate won't be set to 100%.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Currently, the filter is turned off for demonstration purposes, but when you experience it, the rate will be around 50%.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Even at 50%, it's not necessarily safe, is it?

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: You're surprisingly cautious, Iruki.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: I don't want to be a fool who rushes in without knowing and ends up dying.
Olivia stared at Iruki.
He was once regarded as being on par with Dante.
However, she recalled that Royal Magic Academy was not a place that could tolerate the students' arrogance, and he ended up dropping out.
Now all that's left is his three-inch tongue? How pitiful.
Olivia looked back at her students and said.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Iruki is correct.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: The Heaven's Trials are dangerous.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: However, it is a risk that can be controlled.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Royal Magic Academy already conducts training close to real combat by freely adjusting the synchronization rate from 1% to 100% depending on the student's level.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: I am not saying you should take unnecessary risks, but I want to emphasize that the risks can be controlled.
There was no need to apply a high synchronization rate.
Since it's an educational setting, practicing at an appropriate level would naturally enhance one's practical skills.
As the students returned to their places, Olivia began the official lesson on Heaven's Trials.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: The bracelet I am wearing is different from yours; it is a master version.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: It is designed to control various functions of Heaven's Trials.
A 60-centimeter-long red gauge appeared above Olivia's head.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: This is a percentage quantification of my mental strength.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Of course, you won't be able to see the gauge during the practice session.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: First, I'll explain what role it plays.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Teacher Sade, please summon a monster.
The master bracelet shares its functions.
Even if one teacher were to put students in danger, the system is designed so that as long as other teachers are wearing the master bracelet, no dangerous situation would arise.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: Understood.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: But, um... which one should I summon?
In an awkward situation like being asked to choose a lunch menu, Thad decided to leave the choice to Olivia.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Hmm, is it version 6.2?

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: Yes, it's the latest version.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: We updated the information 10 days ago.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Then, demons must have been added.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Let's go with a succubus.
The students' eyes widened in shock.

blocks.speaker: Student
blocks.content: S- Succubus? You can really summon a succubus?
Demons are a powerful species, far beyond ordinary monsters.
They are found in secluded places like ancient towers or underground labyrinths that have been untouched by humans.
Such areas are restricted by the state, only accessible to parties ranked level 6 or higher.
It was generally accepted that the gods appearing in mythology had the characteristics of the demon tribe, and that they were a projection of the collective consciousness of ancient people.
The fact that no new demons have emerged in modern times, when individuality is emphasized, also supports the established theory.
In ancient times, the concepts of good and evil were ambiguous, so taboos beyond imagination were practiced.

The intensity of the stimuli that people of that era enjoyed was so strong that even modern wars couldn't replicate it, and the sublimation of that desire was the demon race, known as the ancient gods.
Given that the succubus is thought to have originated from orgiastic rituals, it was only natural for the curious students to feel nervous.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Then let's begin.
Having found the code name for the succubus, Thad transmitted the information to the central control room.
As beams of light shot out from the four spires, a translucent figure flickered in the tranquil scenery and then solidified into a succubus.
The students stared without even blinking.

They had anticipated this moment, having encountered succubi more in novels or myths than in scholarly texts, but the actual appearance was far from what they expected—more horrifying than they had imagined.
The nearly naked female body was bruised and blue, with grotesque bat wings sprouting from its back.
Its eyes were narrow and slanted, the nose a perfect pig snout, and the teeth so crooked that even with its mouth closed, the lips jutted out.
The lips, bluish like a corpse's, added to the grotesque appearance.

blocks.speaker: Student
blocks.content: I- Is that really a succubus?
The male students grimaced in disgust.
No matter how beautiful the body, the other monstrous features were repulsive.
Olivia examined the succubus's face closely.
She had received reports as an inspector for the Teachers' Association, but this was her first time seeing it in person.
Recognizing the familiar features of the succubus she had once defeated in her youth, Olivia nodded in approval.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Hmm, this seems adequate.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Given how little data we have on demons, I was skeptical.
Olivia clapped her hands to draw the students' attention.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Alright, everyone.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: This might be your first time seeing a succubus.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: This is what they look like.
The monsters simulated by Heaven's Trials are updated based on the information provided by numerous explorers and scholars.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: This is my first time seeing the demon version.
Now, let's see how well it replicates its dream-manipulating abilities.
As Thad switched to test mode, the succubus's appearance began to change.
The students opened their mouths with dumbfounded faces.
Saliva even oozed out from the mouths of the boys in particular.
The succubus now had straight black hair, pale white skin, and a delicate, beautiful face.
And, of course, it was completely naked.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: Um, Principal.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: There are still young students here, isn't this a bit inappropriate…?
As Thad spoke, Olivia stepped aside so they could get a closer look.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: So, what do you think?

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Would you call this beautiful?
A thunderous cheer erupted from the male students.

blocks.speaker: Student
blocks.content: Wow! This is the best!

blocks.speaker: Student
blocks.content: This is really the best!

blocks.speaker: Student
blocks.content: I don't think I would get bored even if I took classes like this all day.
Olivia smiled sweetly.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: In that case, you're all dead.
The room fell silent, as if cold water had been thrown over them.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: No matter how it looks, a demon's essence remains the same.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: And what is a demon?

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: They are grotesque mistakes made by humans who lived a long time ago.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: When you encounter a demon, there's only one thing to consider: Can you kill it or not?

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: The moment you make any other judgment, your head will be rolling on the ground.
As Olivia nodded to Thad, the succubus returned to her original hideous form.
The students felt a chill run down their spines at the thought that they had momentarily been entranced by such a monstrosity.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: There's a saying: 'Seeing is believing.'

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: The succubus's appearance can shake Spirit Zone.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: To confront a demon, you need a party of at least level 6 or higher.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: At that level, a single moment of carelessness can lead to annihilation.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Whether a swordsman gets distracted or a healer rushes to aid the wounded, a mage must not falter.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: It's because we stay cool-headed and vigilant that our comrades can perform their duties to the fullest.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: That's why the mage is the top priority for survival in a party and must be the last to die, if at all.
The students were fully engaged, listening intently.
It was the first time they had received such a brutally honest lesson about what happens on the front lines.
This, too, was part of Olivia's practical, real-world-focused education.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: So, what do you think?

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: This is the effectiveness of Heaven's Trials.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: No matter how much I explain it in words, it is a world apart from seeing it with your own eyes.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Of course, you won't be fighting demons anytime soon, but combat in Heaven's Trials is one of your graduation exam subjects.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: If you make such a mistake in the Colosseum, you will fail.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Sending a magician who makes such errors into the field would lead to the deaths of their comrades.
